creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dear maintainer of FreeBSD port emulators/libspectrum, could you please
take a look at

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=114051
http://home.tiscali.nl/rladan/freebsd/libspectrum.diff

Do you approve this update?

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

Said Helvetica Narrow to Helvetica Bold: "Hey, you're just my type."
